description: Minimalist e-commerce platform in Spring Boot. Serves as a didactic example of Harness Engineering with a multi-agent architecture.

features.name: product_catalog
features.title: Product Catalog API
features.description: Core product entities and read-only endpoints to list and view product details. Implements the standard 3-layer architecture with DTO mapping.
acceptance: Product entity and Spring Data JPA ProductRepository exist
ProductService handles retrieval and maps Entity to ProductDTO
ProductServiceTest uses Mockito to verify service logic
ProductControllerIntegrationTest verifies HTTP 200 and JSON structure using MockMvc and H2

features.name: order_checkout
features.title: Order Creation and Stock Validation
features.description: Allows customers to create an order. Validates product existence and ensures sufficient stock before processing.
acceptance: OrderService uses @Transactional to deduct stock and save the order atomically
OrderController exposes POST /api/orders accepting a list of items
Throws InsufficientStockException if requested quantity exceeds available stock
Global @ControllerAdvice catches DomainExceptions and returns standardized JSON errors
OrderServiceTest verifies stock deduction and exception throwing

features.name: inventory_management
features.title: Backoffice Inventory Management
features.description: Admin endpoints to add new products to the catalog and update existing stock levels.
acceptance: ProductController exposes POST /api/products to create items
ProductController exposes PUT /api/products/{id}/stock to update quantities
Endpoints use constructor injection (@RequiredArgsConstructor) and accept validated DTOs
ProductService handles the persistence of new products and stock updates
Integration tests with MockMvc verify HTTP 201 (Created) and successful database updates in H2
